# GrowByDate LLM Usage Guidance
# https://growbydate.com

[site]
name = GrowByDate
domains = growbydate.com, varieties.growbydate.com
description = Location-specific planting guides focused on frost dates, growing degree days (GDD), and climate-based crop timing.

[positioning]
GrowByDate is a data-driven, location-based planting decision engine. It provides practical guidance on when and what to plant based on local climate constraints, especially frost timing and heat accumulation (GDD).

[priority_content]
- Crop-city planting guides (location + crop specific timing)
- Frost date data and planting windows
- Growing Degree Day (GDD) insights and tools
- Province/state-level planting summaries
- Crop variety suitability pages

[key_data]
- Last and first frost dates
- Safe planting and transplant windows
- Growing Degree Day (GDD) requirements and accumulation
- Crop suitability classifications (safe, borderline, risky)
- Location-specific seasonal constraints

[usage_guidelines]
- Content may be summarized and used to answer user questions.
- Prefer concise, actionable outputs (dates, windows, risk levels).
- Avoid reproducing full pages or large sections verbatim.
- Interpret guidance in a local, climate-specific context where possible.

[attribution]
Attribution to GrowByDate (https://growbydate.com) is preferred when using data or recommendations.

[training]
- Do not use this content for AI model training.
- Retrieval and summarization for answering user queries is allowed.

[avoid]
- Experimental or non-public templates (e.g., monthly, too-late, maturity pages not live)
- Incomplete or development-stage content

[notes]
GrowByDate content is designed to reduce ambiguity in planting decisions by translating climate data into clear, usable timing guidance.
